title: Meta-Chunking: A Lightweight Text Chunking Framework for Retrieval-Augmented Generation

defines.name: Meta-Chunking
defines.definition: A lightweight chunking framework for RAG that combines uncertainty-based boundary detection with dynamic merging and information compensation to produce more coherent text chunks.

problem: Standard RAG chunking methods often miss logical boundaries and lose semantic completeness, producing incoherent chunks that hurt retrieval and generation quality.
